notes: Reportedly purchased the rank of Sartip-e Awwal.
Colonel of the Fadavi Regiment during his father's lifetime.
Later commanded the regiment with the rank of Sartip.
Succeeded to command of the Fadavi Regiment.
Promoted to Sartip in connection with command succession.
Narrative identifies Badr al-Din Gharagoz as governor of Hamadan.
S0001 describes Nasrollah Khan as head of the Gharagozloo forces in Fars.
Sir John Malcolm is cited by S0001 as identifying him as military administrator of the army in Fars.
Appointed Minister of Fars in 1220 AH and replaced by Mohammad Nabi Khan at Nowruz 1223 AH.
